title: Shrimp Curry with Mediterranean Twist
description: A flavorful and aromatic shrimp curry dish with a mediterranean twist, featuring the rich flavors of intense and savory ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the curry powder and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the feta cheese and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until melted and smooth.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and toss to coat with the curry sauce.
Season with oregano, salt, and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
